subject: {player} wants more game time
body:
Coach, {player} has expressed frustration about their lack of playing time recently.

They feel they deserve a spot in the starting lineup. This could become a bigger issue if not managed carefully.

How would you like to handle this?

es.subject: {player} quiere más minutos
es.body:
Jefe, {player} ha expresado frustración por su falta de minutos últimamente.

Cree que merece un puesto en el once inicial. Esto podría convertirse en un problema mayor si no se maneja con cuidado.

¿Cómo le gustaría manejar esto?
